name: hb_1_25
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-10 compute the coefficient of variation (population std / mean) of hourly flue-gas and store: cv_taihang (Hebei Taihang Steel Group), cv_leting (Hegang Leting Steel) (float), more_stable_company_id (the company_id of the lower-CV company, int).

turns.query: Analyze emission variability and stability between Hebei Taihang Steel Group and Hegang Leting Steel on 2025-06-10.
